failures.testName: All static IDs exist in HTML
failures.details: Missing HTML element IDs: perPupilExpenditure, customDomainName, customDomainDesc, customCoreValue, customCompCategory. These are referenced in JS files but not created in the district HTML template.

failures.testName: All onclick handlers exported to window
failures.details: Missing onclick handler exports: stepGoto, clearStep, clearEntirePlan, filterTemplates, applyTemplate. Functions defined in JS but not exposed to window scope.

failures.testName: All static IDs exist in HTML
failures.details: Missing HTML element IDs for goal modal: goalBuilderModal, goalNeed, goalRootCause, goalStatement, goalMetric, goalTarget, goalDate. These fields are referenced in school.js but not created in the strategic-school HTML template.
FUNDING_SOURCES constant/object not found in any budget JS file. Referenced by budget logic but never defined. Likely should be in budget-setup.js or a constants file.
calculateFeasibilityScore function in budget-integration.js (line 519) cannot be parsed for weight values. Function may be missing or have syntax issues preventing weight extraction.
Only 1 of 5 expected budget container elements found in HTML. Missing containers for budget display, allocation, tracker, or summary sections.
Budget validation logic not found in budget-setup.js or budget-integration.js. No function checking minimum budget, maximum allocation, or constraint enforcement.
calculateFeasibilityScore exists in both js/ai-engine.js:725 (takes planState) and js/budget-integration.js:519 (no params). Critical conflict with different signatures and logic.
updateBudgetSummary duplicated in js/budget-alignment.js:118 and js/budget-tracker.js:56 with identical empty signatures. One should be renamed or removed.
trackDownload in js/doc-generator.js:297 (stageId, docType, docName) vs js/toolkit.js:1411 (filename). Different signatures for same purpose.
